title: Pilosella crassiseta

The species Pilosella crassiseta is further classified into the section Pilosella, which is a sub-group of hawkweeds. intro: Pilosella crassiseta, also known as Rough Hawk's Beard, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, Pilosella crassiseta has been used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and respiratory problems, due to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. Pilosella crassiseta is often prepared as a tincture or tea in herbal medicine, and its extracts are also used in the production of phytosterols and other medicinal compounds.
